leaf_rust.very_mild: Apply neem oil spray (2ml/L) weekly. Ensure adequate spacing between plants for air circulation. Remove infected lower leaves.
leaf_rust.mild: Apply Trichoderma-based bio-fungicide (5g/L water). Practice field sanitation — remove and burn infected debris. Monitor crop every 3–4 days.
leaf_rust.moderate: Apply Propiconazole 25% EC @ 0.1% as foliar spray. Repeat in 15 days if needed. Avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer which worsens spread.
leaf_rust.moderately_severe: Spray Tebuconazole 25.9% EC @ 0.1% immediately. Remove severely infected plants to prevent spread. Consult local agricultural extension officer.
leaf_rust.severe: Apply Propiconazole + Trifloxystrobin (Nativo 75WG @ 0.4g/L) immediately. Quarantine affected field sections. Seek emergency support from local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK).

stem_rust.very_mild: Apply garlic extract spray (50g crushed garlic/L) weekly. Monitor for new pustule formation. Ensure proper field drainage.
stem_rust.mild: Apply copper oxychloride (3g/L) as foliar spray. Avoid overhead irrigation — switch to drip. Remove infected lower stems.
stem_rust.moderate: Apply Mancozeb 75WP @ 2g/L or Zineb 75WP @ 2.5g/L. Spray under leaves and stems where spores accumulate.
stem_rust.moderately_severe: Apply Tebuconazole 50% + Trifloxystrobin 25% WG @ 0.5g/L. Report outbreak to local agriculture department. Practice strict crop rotation next season.
stem_rust.severe: Emergency: Spray Propiconazole 25EC @ 1ml/L immediately. Isolate affected rows. Harvest early if infection exceeds 60% canopy. Contact State Agriculture Department.

stripe_rust.very_mild: Apply baking soda spray (5g/L) weekly to alter surface pH. Ensure good field drainage. Remove volunteer wheat plants nearby.
stripe_rust.mild: Spray Sulfur-based fungicide (Sulphowit @ 3g/L) during cool morning hours. Stripe rust thrives in cool weather — monitor temperature forecasts.
stripe_rust.moderate: Apply Propiconazole 25EC @ 0.1% or Hexaconazole 5EC @ 0.2%. Two sprays at 10-day intervals. Avoid dense planting in next season.
stripe_rust.moderately_severe: Apply Tebuconazole 25.9EC @ 1ml/L twice in 10 days. Flag leaf protection is critical at this stage. Consult krishi mitra for field inspection.
stripe_rust.severe: Emergency fungicide: Azoxystrobin 23SC @ 1ml/L + Propiconazole 25EC @ 1ml/L combined spray. Consider crop insurance claim. Early harvest may minimize losses.

healthy.any: Crop appears healthy. Continue regular monitoring every 7–10 days. Maintain balanced NPK fertilization. Avoid waterlogging and practice preventive foliar sprays using copper-based fungicide as a precaution during humid seasons.
